default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly sync between directors to discuss team performance, client updates, and personal check-ins.](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aftershoot client relationship improving; now focused on broad top-of-funnel traffic](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Team composition: 2 MEs (Edisham, Carrie) and 6 CMs supporting 7 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Opportunity identified to create playbook on effective client input calibration](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Suggestion to produce external-facing content as a forcing function for internal improvement](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates

  - [Aftershoot:](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [Initially contentious call, but relationship improving](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Client now focused on broad top-of-funnel traffic, ignoring conversions](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [Team recalibrated approach based on feedback, resulting in a more positive recent call](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Prophecy:](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [Highly engaged client, requesting extra time on calls](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Mitesh leaving, but team expanding involvement for holistic end-to-end strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Team Composition and Changes

  - [Current structure:](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [2 Managing Editors (MEs): Edisham and Carrie](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [6 Content Managers (CMs): Jessica Gallo, Jennifer Dabon, Joe Silvar, Saskia, Odidiye, and one other](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Recent changes:](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [Juergen resigned (described as "non-regrettable" departure)](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [Team will be handling 7 accounts in two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### Skill Development Opportunities

  - [Identified weakness in team's input calibration skills](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Proposal to create playbook on asking good questions and getting right inputs](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Suggestion to record mini-podcasts with Darrell, Panzer, and potentially Megan](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [Focus: Leveraging experience from interviewing 5000+ people](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [Dual purpose: Internal guide and external artifact showcasing GrowthX methodology](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

### Content Strategy Philosophy

  - [Emphasis on creating external-facing content as a driver for internal improvement](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Critique of separate "sales enablement" content; advocate for unified messaging](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Discussion on value of externalizing point-of-view (referencing VC interactions)](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Plan recording sessions with Darrell, Panzer, and potentially Megan for input calibration guide](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Develop playbook on effective questioning techniques for team skill improvement](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Review current client interaction approaches, particularly for new client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Monitor Aftershoot relationship progress and continue recalibrated approach](https://fathom.video/share/cBvt_QxwLg26s4psBK12wrGjKxPh1XPf?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
